data.content:
Implementation review rejected.

1. src/lib/agent-adapter.ts:116-125 builds Gemini interactive args as `-p -i stream-json -o stream-json -y`, but the local Gemini CLI help and official Gemini docs define `-p/--prompt` as a string that forces headless mode and `-i/--prompt-interactive` as a string prompt. This argv therefore does not select a valid Gemini interactive machine-readable session entrypoint, so acceptance criteria 1-3 are not met.
2. src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child.ts:377-379 and src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child.ts:211-215 route both claimed-step and take-loop Gemini sessions through that invalid argv. The new runtime/tests validate a synthetic stdin stream-json protocol instead of a verified Gemini session contract, so acceptance criterion 4 does not cover the real integration risk.
